  • Classes in net.sf.jailer.datamodel used by net.sf.jailer.database
    Class
    Description
    Column
    Column of a table.
    Table
    Describes a database-table.
  • Classes in net.sf.jailer.datamodel used by net.sf.jailer.datamodel
    Class
    Description
    AggregationSchema
    All XML-aggregation schemas.
    Association
    An association between database-tables.
    Cardinality
    Enumeration of association's cardinalities.
    Column
    Column of a table.
    DataModel
    Relational data model.
    DataModel.ColumnOrderPriority
    Order priority of a column.
    DataModel.NoPrimaryKeyException
    Thrown if a table has no primary key.
    DataModel.XmlSettings
    Holds XML settings for exportation into XML files.
    Filter
    SQL Expression for server-side column data filtering.
    FilterSource
    Source of derived Filter.
    ModelElement
    Element of a data model (Table or Association).
    PrimaryKey
    Primary-key of a Table.
    PrimaryKeyFactory
    Factory for PrimaryKeys.
    RestrictionDefinition
    Defines a restriction on an association.
    Table
    Describes a database-table.
